title: Bazaar Flip
description: A simple minecraft Bazaar Flipping Mod for Hypixel Skyblock using Hypixel public API
body:
#  Bazaar Flipping Mod for Hypixel Skyblock (1.21.9 to 26.1.2)  

This mod helps you track the most profitable trades in the Hypixel Skyblock Bazaar, allowing you to buy low and sell high with ease.

## Features  
 **Real-time price tracking** – Stay ahead of market fluctuations.  
 **Profit margin calculations** – Instantly see which flips are worth it.  
 **Customizable UI** – Adjust settings easily via **Right Shift (O)**.  

--- 
![Screenshot 2](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0e0761bd-8fb0-47c0-adc7-16c969660838)  
![Configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ca1119e2711b9dc6e0e72c1dbe86a0c9fbb87f4_0.webp)

##  Download & Installation  
1. **Download the mod** from Modrinth.  
2. **Install Fabric (Depending on the version)** (if you haven’t already).  
3. **Drop the mod file** into your `mods` folder.  
4. **Launch Minecraft** and start flipping smarter!  

##  Additional Information  
- This mod does **not** automate trading-it only provides real-time data to help you make informed decisions.
